compiled_state.title: AC1 contradiction in f493-bf4e: run-all.sh exits non-zero due to new RED test
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description: Acceptance criterion 1 of task f493-bf4e requires bash tests/run-all.sh to exit 0. However, AC2 requires new test cases to FAIL (RED). These are mutually contradictory: run-all.sh exits 0 only when ALL suites pass, and the new RED test test_review_tier_valid_value_passes causes the hook suite to exit non-zero. The .test-index RED marker already exists and the pre-commit test gate tolerates the failure, but the literal AC1 criterion cannot be satisfied. Options: (1) update AC1 to acknowledge expected non-zero exit from run-all.sh during RED phase, (2) verify that existing .test-index marker satisfies the intent of AC1, or (3) restructure the criterion.

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The .test-index contains a RED marker [test_review_tier_valid_value_passes] for tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_review_tier_valid_value_passes' .test-index
- [ ] The pre-commit test gate tolerates the RED test failure
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'RED zone failures tolerated'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh runs without regressions (pre-existing RED failures only)

## File Impact
- .test-index (verify existing RED marker)
- tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh (no changes expected)
comments.author: Main
